$comment: Country-level place registry entry for India. The country renders to line/scalar primitives only (never a choropleth), so it deliberately carries no GeoJSON. Created 2026-05-17 for the country-entity URL rollout (ADR-0028, TODO/20260517-iced-bulk-ingest-and-parity-oracle.md Phase 1 step 3). When the country-entity loader (Phase 3b) lands, it reads this file to validate `/india` / `/india/<indicator-slug>` routes.
name: India
